user_story: As an HR admin, I want to access a pre-onboarding checklist for candidates, so that I can track pre-joining tasks before a new hire starts
acceptance_criteria: Given I navigate to the Pre Onboarding Checklist screen; When the page loads successfully; Then I can view the pre-onboarding checklist for candidates

user_story: As an HR admin, I want the Pre Onboarding Checklist page to load reliably, so that I am not blocked by timeout errors when reviewing candidate onboarding
acceptance_criteria: Given I open the Pre Onboarding Checklist screen; When the page is requested; Then it loads within an acceptable time without a navigation timeout
